# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: example.com
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  read_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  write_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  connect_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Route
metadata:
  name: example-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  paths:
    - /example
  service:
    name: example-service
    port: 8000
  plugins:
    - name: cors
      config:
        origins:
          - "http://localhost:4200" # CORS for localhost:4200 only
        methods:
          - GET
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: example.com
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  read_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  write_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  connect_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Route
metadata:
  name: example-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  paths:
    - /example
  service:
    name: example-service
    port: 8000
  plugins:
    - name: rate-limiting
      config:
        minute: 50 # Per minute limit of 50 requests.
        policy: local # Use a fixed window policy to count requests.
        headers:
          - ip
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: example.com
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  read_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  write_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  connect_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Route
metadata:
  name: example-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  paths:
    - /example
  service:
    name: example-service
    port: 8000
  plugins:
    - name: authentication
      config:
        consumer_username: <EMAIL> # Authentication for user <EMAIL>.
        anonymous: false # Require a username and password to access this route.
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1

        anonymous: false # Require a username and password to access this route.
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: example.com
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  read_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  write_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  connect_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Route
metadata:
  name: example-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  paths:
    - /example
  service:
    name: example-service
    port: 8000
  plugins:
    - name: authentication
      config:
        consumer_username: <EMAIL> # Authentication for user <EMAIL>.
        anonymous: false # Require a username and password to access this route.
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: example.com
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  read_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  write_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  connect_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Route
metadata:
  name: example-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  paths:
    - /example
  service:
    name: example-service
    port: 8000
  plugins:
    - name: authentication
      config:
        consumer_username: <EMAIL> # Authentication for user <EMAIL>.
        anonymous: false # Require a username and password to access this route.

  name: example-service
  namespace: default

  host: example.com
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  read_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  write_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  connect_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)

  name: example-route
  namespace: default

  paths:
    - /example
  service:
    name: example-service
    port: 8000
  plugins:
    - name: authentication
      config:
        consumer_username: <EMAIL> # Authentication for user <EMAIL>.
        anonymous: false # Require a username and password to access this route.

  name: example-service
  namespace: default

  host: example.com
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  read_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  write_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  connect_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)

  name: example-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  paths:
    - /example
  service:
    name: example-service
    port: 8000
  plugins:
    - name: authentication
      config:
        consumer_username: <EMAIL> # Authentication for user <EMAIL>.
        anonymous: false # Require a username and password to access this route.

kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: example.com
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  read_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  write_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  connect_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
---

kind: Route
metadata:
  name: example-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  paths:
    - /example
  service:
    name: example-service
    port: 8000
  plugins:
    - name: authentication
      config:
        consumer_username: <EMAIL> # Authentication for user <EMAIL>.
        anonymous: false # Require a username and password to access this route.
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: example.com
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  read_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  write_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  connect_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Route
metadata:
  name: example-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  paths:
    - /example
  service:
    name: example-service
    port: 8000
  plugins:
    - name: authentication
      config:
        consumer_username: <EMAIL> # Authentication for user <EMAIL>.
        anonymous: false # Require a username and password to access this route.
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: example.com
  port: 8000
  protocol: http
  read_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  write_timeout: 60000 # milliseconds (60 seconds)
  connect_timeout: 60000 #
